description: Invariant enforcement for the straitjacket plugin. Three hooks: UserPromptExpansion fires on the green-baseline skills (tdd, mutation, fuzz, debug) — the preflight hook currently ALLOWS and defers the real baseline/lint gate to the skill's Phase 1 (audit/triage/report-bug are excluded: audit is read-only analysis, triage routes, report-bug captures fast). PreToolUse on Agent scans adversarial-specialist prompts for diff leakage in the legacy Agent-dispatch path; it does NOT fire for workflow-spawned agents, where diff-isolation (adversarial AND audit specialists) rests on their Read/Grep/Glob-only tool restriction (verified by spike). PostToolUse on Agent dispatches verify-new-tests-compile / run-new-tests by subagent_type in the legacy path; in workflow mode the skill runs those as explicit stage steps. Test-mutation enforcement is the end-of-phase verify-no-test-mutation audit + the adversarial-vacuousness/misalignment specialists + behavioral name-survival, not a per-author SHA hook.
